test_cases.title: Successful Login
test_cases.description: Verify that a registered user can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the Accounts Overview page with a welcome message.
test_cases.expected_results: User is authenticated, redirected to the Accounts Overview page, sees a welcome message with their first and last name, and the 'Log Out' link is visible.

test_cases.title: Unsuccessful Login - Invalid Username
test_cases.description: Verify that the system denies access when an invalid username is entered.
test_cases.expected_results: Access is denied, error message 'The username and password could not be verified.' is displayed, and user is redirected to the /parabank/login.htm error page.

test_cases.title: Unsuccessful Login - Invalid Password
test_cases.description: Verify that the system denies access when an invalid password is entered.
test_cases.expected_results: Access is denied, error message 'The username and password could not be verified.' is displayed, and user is redirected to the /parabank/login.htm error page.

test_cases.title: Unsuccessful Login - Empty Username
test_cases.description: Verify that the system denies access when the username field is left empty.
test_cases.expected_results: Access is denied, error message 'Please enter a username and password.' is displayed, and user is redirected to the /parabank/login.htm error page.

test_cases.title: Unsuccessful Login - Empty Password
test_cases.description: Verify that the system denies access when the password field is left empty.
test_cases.expected_results: Access is denied, error message 'Please enter a username and password.' is displayed, and user is redirected to the /parabank/login.htm error page.

test_cases.title: Session Termination - Log Out
test_cases.description: Verify that an authenticated user can log out successfully and is redirected to the public homepage.
test_cases.expected_results: Session is terminated, user is redirected to the public homepage (/parabank/index.htm).

test_cases.title: Unsuccessful Login - SQL Injection Attempt
test_cases.description: Verify that the system denies access when an SQL injection attempt is made in the username field.
steps: Enter an SQL injection string in the Username field (e.g., ' OR '1'='1).
test_cases.expected_results: Access is denied, error message 'The username and password could not be verified.' is displayed, and no SQL injection is executed.

test_cases.title: Unsuccessful Login - Long Strings
test_cases.description: Verify that the system handles long strings in the username and password fields appropriately.
steps: Enter a long string (e.g., 256 characters) in the Username field.
Enter a long string (e.g., 256 characters) in the Password field.
test_cases.expected_results: Access is denied, error message 'The username and password could not be verified.' is displayed, and the system does not crash.

test_cases.title: Unsuccessful Login - Special Characters
test_cases.description: Verify that the system handles special characters in the username and password fields appropriately.
steps: Enter a username with special characters (e.g., 'user!@#').
Enter a password with special characters (e.g., 'pass!@#').
test_cases.expected_results: Access is denied, error message 'The username and password could not be verified.' is displayed.

test_cases.title: Unsuccessful Login - Multiple Failed Attempts
test_cases.description: Verify that the system locks the user out after multiple failed login attempts.
steps: Repeat the above two steps 5 times.
test_cases.expected_results: User is locked out after 5 failed attempts, and an appropriate error message is displayed.

test_cases.title: Unsuccessful Login - Browser Back Button
test_cases.description: Verify that the user cannot log in again using the browser back button after logging out.
steps: Use the browser back button to return to the Accounts Overview page.
test_cases.expected_results: User is redirected to the login page instead of accessing the Accounts Overview page.
